title: MD
biography: Denton Cooley was an American cardiovascular surgeon who performed the first successful heart transplant in the United States in 1968 and the first total artificial heart implantation in 1969. He founded the Texas Heart Institute and performed over 100,000 open-heart operations during his career.
aiSummary: Denton Cooley was a cardiovascular surgery specialist with an H-index of 80 at the Texas Heart Institute. Performed the first US heart transplant and first total artificial heart implantation. Based in Houston, United States.
education: Johns Hopkins University School of Medicine
